properties.dose: Oral Light: 60-80mg Common: 80-120mg Strong: 120mg+ Insufflated Light: 10-15mg Common: 15-20mg Strong: 20-25mg+ Vapourized Light: 10-20mg Common: 20-25mg Strong: 25-30mg+
properties.duration: Oral: 4-6 hours. | Insufflated: 2-3 hours. | Smoked: 0.5-1 hours.
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.onset: Oral: 60-90 minutes. | Insufflated: 10-15 minutes. | Smoked: 5-10 minutes.
properties.summary: A rare psychedelic tryptamine related to DMT and DET. There is little known information about this drug, further research is highly recommended.
